productionDeploy.method: Local git bundle from production ancestor 100a34387 to 43f067a45; production dirty hotfixes stashed, fast-forwarded, and reapplied without conflicts.
productionDeploy.restart: pm2 restart sms-api --update-env passed; process online

verified: Focused M2 backend tests passed for lead/campaign scope, enrichment/export, AI cohorts, LeadCohort cache, AI cohort cron, Pipeline AI golden grader, Inbox reply linking, retarget suppression, send-path suppression, and outbound template guards
Root build passed: server tsc, client tsc, and Vite production build
Leads page renders search, Import, Add Lead, Export CSV, filters, enrichment columns, and no document-level horizontal overflow
Leads status/list filters, Add Lead submit payload, CSV preview, mapped import, and Export CSV request path were covered in mocked UI smoke plus server tests
Production live CSV flow passed with AN uploader, HB isolated rep, admin visibility, enrichment fields, filter-aware export, and cleanup
Campaigns page renders search, status filters, New Campaign, AI Retarget Suggestions, retained All Campaigns list, and no document-level horizontal overflow
New Campaign create path, Start/Pause/Cancel actions, campaign analytics/detail scope, and campaign ownership negative cases are covered by focused regression tests
Inbox reply/campaign reply linking is covered by focused regression tests
Retarget suppression helper and send-path edge cases are covered by focused regression tests
Template unresolved-variable/test-message guards are covered by focused regression tests
Admin and rep Leads/Campaigns visual screenshots were captured and compared against the retained v3 prototype scope

focusedTests.command: cd server && npx vitest run tests/pipelineAiService.test.ts tests/pipelineAiGoldenGrader.test.ts tests/leadCampaignScope.test.ts tests/leadEnrichmentExport.test.ts tests/campaignAiCohorts.test.ts tests/aiCohortCron.test.ts tests/inboxReplyReclassification.test.ts tests/retargetSuppression.test.ts tests/sendingEngineRetarget.test.ts tests/outboundMessageGuard.test.ts
notes: Redis ECONNREFUSED warnings are expected in local focused tests and did not fail the suite.

visualSmoke.tooling: Playwright chromium against Vite dev server with deterministic API mocks

remainingRisks: No M2.4 blocker remains. Overall project readiness is still gated by production SMTP smoke for email OTP fallback.
